'''Gahseelik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] who disgraced his clan by leaving [[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]] to work for [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. For this a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was posted on his head by [[Trossilik]]. His bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] for 3,000 credits, who was on a mission to meet with Gardulla.

==Behind the scenes==
Gahseelik's bounty was worth 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 credits [[Death/Legends|dead]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
